—Here is a law against all conformity to the corrupt practices of non-believers. Also laws against incest, brutal desires, and savage idolatries; and the enforcement of these laws from the destruction of the Canaanites. God here gives moral commands. Close and constant obedience to God’s ordinances is the most effective protection from blatant sin. The grace of God only will secure us; that grace is to be expected only in the use of means of grace. Nor does He ever leave anyone to their desires until they have left Him and His service.
